creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
How well chromium works when sndiod is NOT running? See bug 218188. For comparison, pulseaudio doesn't support serverless mode, so the daemon is started on demand by libpulse.

From Makefile:
# With SNDIO=on we exclude audio_manager_linux from the build (see
# media/audio/BUILD.gn) and use audio_manager_openbsd which does not
# support falling back to ALSA or PulseAudio.
